hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *'/.env'|'.env') echo 'Refused: .env is git-ignored secrets file (MOOMOO_TRADE_PWD, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, REDDIT creds). Edit .env.example instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\.duckdb([^a-zA-Z0-9_/.-]|$)' && echo 'Warning: *.duckdb files are single-writer (FastAPI process only). External writes risk corruption if uvicorn is running. See CLAUDE.md.' >&2 && exit 1; exit 0
